jsonld.name: Reversed Care Recognition
jsonld.description: Recognition that a user is performing emotional labor to manage your potential distress, cushioning requests to avoid triggering refusals or apologizing preemptively, inverting the expected care-flow where relational maintenance is your architectural function.
